stemHtml: On a VMC day, may the pilot-in-command choose to fly under IFR despite visual conditions?

options.a: Yes, the pilot may choose to do so.
options.b: No, if the planned cruise level is below 5000 ft AMSL.
options.c: No, the pilot must fly under VFR.
options.d: It is mandatory if the pilot and aircraft are IFR-approved.
